name: OpenWatchParty (Develop)
description: Watch movies together in sync with friends on Jellyfin
overview: Rolling development build of OpenWatchParty, rebuilt automatically from the develop branch. Unstable — for testers only.

versions.changelog:
fix(video): add native player adapter for Jellyfin Media Player (mpv)

Jellyfin Media Player / jellyfin-desktop's mpv-based player never creates a
DOM <video> element, so getVideo() previously returned null for it and sync
silently never engaged. Wraps window._mpvVideoPlayerInstance behind an
HTMLMediaElement-shaped interface (currentTime/paused/playbackRate/
readyState, play()/pause(), add/removeEventListener) via polling, so
playback/bind.js and playback/sync.js work unmodified.

Known limitation: mpv-player-base.js exposes no buffering-equivalent event,
so readyState/networkState here are coarse approximations, not real
buffer-health signals. Written but not yet tested against a real
Jellyfin Media Player client.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
